programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: Dirty Angels
programme.desc: Following the US withdrawal from Afghanistan in 2021, a group of female soldiers are sent back in to rescue a group of kidnapped teenagers.

programme.title: The Immortal Life of Henrietta Lacks
programme.desc: Based on the book of the same name, this HBO Original film tells the true story of a woman whose cells were used to create the first immortal human cell line.

programme.title: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: When a successful publicist finds himself an unemployed single father back living with his dad in the suburbs, he learns to acknowledge what truly makes him happy.

programme.title: Atomic Homefront
programme.desc: Probing the devastating impact of the illegal dumping of radioactive waste in North St. Louis communities, the moms-turned-advocates fight for answers.

programme.title: Blood Diamond
programme.desc: A smuggler, fisherman and reporter team up in search of a priceless pink diamond, a lost son and the dark story behind the diamond trade.

programme.title: Dtf St. Louis S1
programme.desc: A darkly comedic limited series about a love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise, that leads to one of them ending up dead.

programme.title: Rooster S1

programme.desc: Explores the madness of the television world and the bravery of a tragic actress as she struggles to keep her career afloat while balancing her personal life

programme.title: It's a Hard Truth, Ain'T It
programme.desc: Filmed at Indiana’s Pendleton Correctional Facility and co-directed by 13 incarcerated men, the documentary follows them as they reflect on their lives and the consequences of their crimes.

programme.title: Four Christmases
programme.desc: When their exotic vacation flight is cancelled, a couple has no choice but to spend Christmas with each of their divorced parents and dysfunctional families.

programme.title: Cinema Verite: The Saga of an American Family
programme.desc: Witness the birth of reality TV in the early 1970s with the Loud family in this ground-breaking HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: The Golden Compass

programme.title: Furious 7
programme.desc: With a revenge-thirsty assassin hot on their heels, Dominic Toretto, Brian O'Conner and the rest of the crew come together as a team to protect their own.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: The origin story of the man who became Dracula. Vlad III, Prince of Wallachia, enters into a Faustian pact to save his people and becomes inflicted with an insatiable thirst for human blood.

programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: When Iris realizes that she is an AI companion for her boyfriend, she must embrace who she is and fight to survive in a battle for ultimate control.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, brothers-in-arms, turned sworn enemies.

programme.title: The Snitch
programme.desc: Kang-soo was falsely accused and imprisoned. A prosecutor offered him a deal to be a snitch in exchange for a reduced sentence and Kang-soo starts to shake up the drug investigation...

programme.title: The Attorney
programme.desc: When tax attorney Song Woo-Suk agrees to defend a student activist who was arrested and tortured into giving a false confession, his entire life and worldview begin to change drastically.

programme.title: Only God Knows Everything
programme.desc: Do-woon has just been ordained. A man admits to killing his mother during confession. Torn between his duty as a priest and his desire for revenge as a son, he faces a demonic group...

programme.title: The Exclusive: Beat The Devil's Tattoo
programme.desc: When a journalist discovers that his exclusive story on a serial killer was based on false information, he fabricates more lies to cover his mistake.

programme.title: The Housemaid
programme.desc: Eun-yi is hired as a nanny in an lavish mansion by businessman Hoon and his pregnant wife, Hae-ra. When Eun-yi is seduced by the father of the house, she becomes the unwitting victim in a series of traps laid by the women of the house. Eun-yi must now outwit and escape the vicious family to protect her sanity and her life.

programme.title: Enemies In-Law
programme.desc: Chul-soo, the son of notorious criminals, falls for Young-hee, a detective. To win her father's approval, he vows to pass the police exam. As their wedding approaches, his parents try to sabotage his future while Young-hee investigates a serial murder case, and Chul-soo uses his family's skills to help.

programme.title: Love Me Ep7
programme.desc: Adapted from a Swedish drama, it tells the story of a woman who appears to live a perfect life holds a secret behind her loneliness.

programme.title: Love Me Ep8
programme.desc: Adapted from a Swedish drama, it tells the story of a woman who appears to live a perfect life holds a secret behind her loneliness.

programme.title: Big Match
programme.desc: A man framed for murder battles a game planner who is intent on turning a city into one giant game board that he can control.

programme.title: Canola
programme.desc: Gye-choon and her lost grandaughter Hye-ji reunited after 12 years, yet Hye-ji's strange behaviour raise questions on what happened to her while they were apart.

programme.title: Love 911
programme.desc: A doctor tries to woo a grieving, widowed firefighter in her attempt to get him to testify on her behalf in a medical malpractice case.

programme.title: The Pirates
programme.desc: Before the founding of the Joseon Dynasty, envoys from China lose the Royal Seal to a whale. A group of bandits attempt to retrieve it for a large reward and run into a group of pirates.

programme.title: Road To Boston
programme.desc: A group of marathoners want to run proudly under the Korean flag after Korea's liberation. Though they couldn't afford a pair of sneakers, they embark on an unforgettable journey to Boston.

programme.title: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: An evil spirit that changes faces infiltrates a family, placing one brother in danger while the other tries to save him.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When an alien beetle infestation threatens to expose their true identities, the Royals must depend on a new ally for help. Meanwhile, Zadra joins Morando’s army as a double agent who secretly spies on him for the growing Resistance.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Stuck in a time-loop, Aja finds unlikely help from Jim Lake and Team Trollhunters. Meanwhile, a giant Troll rampages the Arcadia High Science Fair, threatening to expose both the Troll world and Aja and Krel’s alien secret.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret “Echo” Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the “keys” in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret “Echo” Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) – and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Rhino didn't charge and he couldn't see very well at all. Poor old Rhino really wanted to be invited to the Dance of the Horns up on the plains with Buffalo and all the other horned animals. But Rhino didn't have a horn, so he wasn't allowed. The Monkeys decide to help Rhino and make him a horn from a piece of old wood. But when Rhino wakes up he doesn't know what it is. ‘Aargh! Thing on the end of my nose! CHAAaarge!' And that's Why Rhino Charges. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see Caterpillar was never in a hurry. When all the animals were racing around Tinga Tinga getting ready for the Best-dressed parade, Caterpillar was happy to sit in a tree and munch on leaves saying ‘Po-le, po-le, slowly, slowly, good things come to those who wait'. Then one day the rains come and Caterpillar disappears into a cocoon. ‘What's happening?' questions Elephant. ‘Wait and see' says Tortoise wisely ‘Wait and See'. Then Caterpillar transforms into the most beautiful butterfly ever!... But who wins the Best-dressed parade? Tales from Africa

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Julian is very excited about the Sealife Awareness Day at Greendale School. While he's talking to Pat about it, his dad gets a call from Ben - a special delivery! Pat discovers it's a giant inflatable shark which is to be the surprise centrepiece of the Sealife day. But when Pat stops to help Alf mend a gate, a mix-up with parcel tape ends up with the whale accidentally inflating and floating off... Pat must use his ingenuity to catch the whale and - most important of all - deliver it in time for the special Sealife Awareness event...

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat must deliver Ben to Greendale School, dressed as superhero, The Blue Flash. But Ben keeps stopping to help people on the way and his costume gets increasingly ruined! Meanwhile at the school, Julian can't wait to meet his hero but Sarah Gilbertson insists that The Blue Flash isn't real... At last Pat arrives at the school with Ben wearing a new costume hastily cobbled together by Pat. Julian isn't fooled. Looks like The Blue Flash isn't real after all... But then Pat tells the kids how Ben helped people on the way and they realise he is a REAL superhero!

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing
programme.desc: After winning a citizen swap contest, Archibald moves to a mountain town for a week. Archibald finds a practical use for his pal's wacky invention.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing
programme.desc: Crackridge's new resident dinosaur has a hard time fitting in. Archibald and a new friend attempt to conquer their fear of the basement.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is upset because her best friend, Deltoid, keeps calling her a monster and running away from her. Noddy decides to investigate and find out why Deltoid's behaving so strangely. He soon discovers that Deltoid has lost all his memories and doesn't recognise any of his friends anymore. It takes all Noddy's powers of deduction and gathering evidence on the WhoWhatWhere Tablet to realise that Deltoid has lost his memory chip! All he has to do now is stop Deltoid trying to trap Smartysaurus long enough to refit the chip and restore his memories. Good luck Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Pat-Pat is meant to be giving a baton twirling display at the Town Hall but the stage is covered with sticky stuff. Clockwork Mouse and Carlton can clear up the sticky stuff but Noddy must investigate to find out who was trying to spoil Pat-Pat's show or they might do it again! Using his wwwbook to follow all the clues from polishing day at the Fairy Castle to Fairy Coco swapping the polish for a ribbon, Noddy works out it was Pat-Pat who tried to delay her show. She wanted to practise more! Noddy and Bumpy help Pat-Pat to feel confident about the performance and she gives a great display. Thanks, Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Fuse is heartbroken when his new special toy wash is broken. Right before Revs could have a wash in it too! Noddy decides to investigate and help the little robot find out who has broken it. Using all his investigating skills and collecting evidence with the WhoWhatWhere Tablet Noddy realises that it's his own best beloved car, Revs, who broke the toy wash! Poor Revs thought that if he went through the toy wash he'd miss his special time with Noddy and Bumpy. Noddy finds a way for Revs to enjoy the toy wash AND still has his special playtime with his best friends. Clever Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Everyone in Fable Fields is very worried that a new Dazzle Dragon has appeared in the land. Big Ears says there's no such thing as a Dragon in Toyland so Noddy decides to investigate. All the evidence seems to lead to a dragon – footprints, loud noises and glimpses of shiny scales in the woods but clever Noddy thinks it through and, using his investigating skills of looking and looking again, soon realises that the ‘dragon' isn't a dragon at all! It's the knights out on patrol in their shiny armour and tight formation! Phew! Thanks Noddy!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders get stuck in a cave with their rival, Magnus, during a race to find a new source of an important mineral.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Frustrated that she's not fitting in with the team, Aggro goes off on her own with Elbone on a mission to save a dragon egg trapped in ice.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When the banana bread Harper leaves out for Eden is stolen, the Dew Drops create a sting operation to catch the thief. / When Captain Meow Meow gets a splinter in his paw and hears the word "vet," he flees. Now it's up to the Dew Drops to find Captain Meow Meow and get that splinter out.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: One of Tag’s biggest dreams is to be a contestant on her favorite TV game show: The Pawmazing Race, hosted by Kelly Korgi. Which is why she entered her entire family to compete in the family edition! And now that dream is finally coming true! / The Barker Family continue their quest to become the winners of The Pawmazing Race. But the challenges only get tougher from here on out. Tag learns that her family’s quirky traits can help them through any obstacle.

programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: Today is Yarn Ball Day, a special day in the cat-filled town of Meowbuquerque. Unfortunately, the bridge leading to the party is broken. With time ticking, Tag, Scooch, and Kit work together at getting the cats across to the party. / When The Barkapellas announce that they’re cancelling their biggest concert ever, Tag is determined to figure out why in order to get them back on stage. But with a stadium full of impatient fans, Tag is going to have to work fast.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When parts go missing from the garage, Ace and Skya solve the mystery when they discover D-Structs has a new claw-tail which they put to the test.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: While Lucky attempts to win over a town that is unwelcoming to the circus, she starts to question her own reasoning to stay

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep & Thunk cheer up Squawk to avoid the first final exam/Eep and Lerk venture to the Garden of Eaten after the Broods spike the Watering Hole

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: To learn about jobs, Grug assigns kids to the first “shadowing”/Ugga mistakenly creates the first gossip to impress the “nitting” club

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Thinking he's allergic to Meatlug, Fishlegs gets hypnotized – and wakes up transformed into an invincible warrior known as Thor Bonecrusher.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Dagur the Deranged captures Gustav, it's up to Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders to get him back.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Mom and Dad Templeton do the unthinkable: leave Boss Baby and Tim under the authority of a babysitter!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Mom tries to help Tim get over his fear of the neighborhood crazy-cat-lady

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Mega Fat CEO Baby holds a game day at Baby Corp and Boss Baby must find a way to beat Mega Fat CEO Baby at his own game

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold transform the school's mysterious student into a giant clay monster who turns the entire town into clay

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold transform their new Spanish teacher into a superhero after they feel guilty for pranking him, but their teacher loves it and gets carried away

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After Erica convinces them that being suspended is a great vacation, George and Harold pull off every prank they can think of in order to get suspended

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi finally reveals his master plan.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids battle Shashi in Las Vegas as Shashi tries to take down evil billionaire Cleve and use Skeleton Key to create a new world order. Frostee has a plan to get Skeleton Key offline, but it only gives Tony ten seconds to take Shashi out and save the world.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Heather and Windshear land on Dragon's Edge to join the Dragon Rider crew, they quickly discover that Windshear doesn't play well with others.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup and Toothless are captured and must find a way to escape the Dragon Fighting arena and survive an attack from the fearsome Triple Stryke dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: After the Riders save a Deathsong egg from the Dragon Hunters, they must take it back to Melody Island when the hatched baby won't stop crying.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim tries to impress Claire's parents when invited over for BBQ, but when his Amulet goes haywire, Jim must contend with his own worst enemy – himself

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The students are assigned to care for flour babies in Health Class but must worry more than just their grades after discovering a Gruesome lurking in Arcadia

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: After Steve discovers “monsters” could be lurking under Arcadia, he allies with Eli to investigate

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: A menacing school board Administrator demands Aja and Krel's immigration papers to register for school - a task that turns dangerous for the two "illegal Aliens." Meanwhile, Aja bejins her warrior training with Vex

programme.title: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: In London for the Prime Minister's funeral, Mike Banning is caught up in a plot to assassinate all the attending world leaders.

programme.title: Dew
programme.desc: Pop and Dew are friends who study at the same school but slowly realize, that there might be something more than friendship between them. Unfortunately, they live in an era which isn't open to homosexuals and thus the two get separated only to meet 23 years later.

programme.title: Sinkhole
programme.desc: A man and his family has just recently moved into a house when a sinkhole suddenly engulfs the whole apartment. As rain begins to fill the sinkhole with water, the survivors must find a solution before time runs out.

programme.title: My Lovely Angel
programme.desc: A life-changing story of a man who has lived as a loner his entire life. Jae Shik begins to live together with a child with a hearing-visual disability, as they change each other's lives and try to find a way to communicate.

programme.title: Bride For Rent
programme.desc: Adaptation of Philippine movie, Bride for Rent. Two unknown people decided to work together for a fake wedding to get the money they wanted.

programme.title: Recalled
programme.desc: A woman wakes up from an accident having lost her memory. She begins to have disturbing visions starting a desperate fight to uncover the truth about her past.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: The Hong Kong super-cop must stop a group of blackmailing bombers at the same time that the villains of the first Police Story are out for revenge

programme.title: The Master (2013)
programme.desc: When martial arts master Chen Xiang refuses to join the armies of the Qing Prince, his mother and his students are seized. To save them, Chen has only one path: all-out war.

programme.title: The Bachelors
programme.desc: After his wife's early death, a mourning father moves with his teenage son across the country for a private-school teaching job. Their lives begin to transform thanks to two unique women who help them embrace life and love again.

programme.title: Hitman: Agent Jun
programme.desc: An unsuccessful comic book artist runs into trouble after publishing a story containing real secrets from his former life as a NIS hitman

programme.title: Security
programme.desc: A security guard protects an eleven year-old girl who is being targeted by a gang for participating as a trial witness.

programme.title: Dragon Fist
programme.desc: A dishonored student of the Dragon Fist Sect seeks revenge for the death of his teacher.

programme.title: Project Silence
programme.desc: Silence takes place when an accident occurs on a foggy bridge and, as a result, an unknown beast is unleashed.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: While everyone prepares for the park's annual barbecue, things go awry when Rigby accidentally burns Benson's hot dogs.

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: When Gwen drags Ben along on a hike in search of the legendary Forgeti - a yeti that makes people forget they ever saw it - Ben is dubious. But with Dr. Animo on the trail of the mythical beast as well, what looks like a hoax becomes a hero time adventure for the ages... if Ben can remember it ever happened.

programme.title: Courage The Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: Vacationing on a cruise ship that sinks, Muriel, Courage and the Farmer end up on a deserted island. The one inhabitant they find is Katz, who runs an unusual 'resort.'

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby decide to make prank phone calls. They try to prank the Master Prank Caller numerous times, although they fail to fool him (and only make him increasingly annoyed).

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Grandpa Max find the Weatherheads using the towering turbines for their latest nefarious plan.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: When the Titans try to get Beast Boy to clean his room, they discover that there's more to garbage than just trash.

programme.title: Super Shiro
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are found in a balloon shop. Shiro rushes to the scene but the balloon has flown away. He jumps onto Deca's drone and discovers a whole new world.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: After Blossom and Buttercup break Schedulebot, they'll do anything to keep the truth from coming out.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Toby secretly tells the Spies that Zerlina is preparing a test for them. So when they investigate Vikings coming alive at the museum they assume it’s a set up until things get completely out of hand. Now a tourist boat is under attack by a Viking ship!

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean wants a smart phone but they’re too expensive especially when you can build your own!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The Titans time travel back to the 1980s to determine whether or not it was the best decade ever.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Hubie and Bertie risk it all to break into a cheese shop.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: It’s Prank Week at Acme Loo and our pals get into escalating shenanigans trying to out prank their rival, Aqua Loo.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: Hamton gets into medical school but soon realizes it’s not at all what he imagined. Buster desperately tries to find a way to bring his pal back to Acme Loo.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: Darwin lends his pen to Banana Joe but, when it comes back chewed, Gumball's thoughts turn to revenge.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Yosemite Sam tries to start a new country. Sylvester does not want to be put out for the night. Daffy keeps eating all the hamburgers Elmer cooks.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: It’s student council elections at Acme Loo! Babs and Buster both run for President, and they enlist Sweetie and Hamton as their respective campaign managers. That just leaves Plucky…who happily revels in the drama!

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: Plucky is named ruler of a kingdom, and the toons visit his castle as he ascends the throne. Before long, Plucky exerts power over his friends, Sweetie tries to overthrow the monarchy, and Hamton lives out his fantasy of the landed gentry.

programme.title: Mechamato
programme.desc: The bad robots are loose and Chachix plans to capture and control them all. Amato has to stop Chachix once and for all.

programme.title: Clarence
programme.desc: After Clarence learns Sumo's in the school musical, he joins up and enthusiastically promotes the show. On opening night with a packed house, stage fright takes hold of Sumo and he runs off, leaving Clarence to go on alone.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: The citizens of Elmore are feeling down because it's January, so Gumball and Anais invent a new holiday called Sluzzle Tag.

programme.title: Grizzy And The Lemmings: World Tour
programme.desc: A block containing Grizzy and the Lemmings' ancestors cracks during their fight and frees the ancestors.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean decides to stay in bed all day – even when making his breakfast, brushing his teeth and ordering a pizza!

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: A dog uncovers trouble when he buries a bone in Bugs Bunny's hole.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are devastated to learn that Mr Robinson - their favourite person in the world - is selling his house and leaving town. When they realise that making some final happy memories with Mr Robinson is not enough for them, they decide to stop him leaving, by sabotaging the sale.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Rigby falls into a coma trying to win a trucker hat in a local contest so in honor of his sick friend Mordecai begins to train for the contest.

programme.title: Steven Universe

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When an alien beetle infestation threatens to expose their true identities, the Royals must depend on a new ally for help. Meanwhile, Zadra joins Morando’s army as a double agent who secretly spies on him for the growing Resistance.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Stuck in a time-loop, Aja finds unlikely help from Jim Lake and Team Trollhunters. Meanwhile, a giant Troll rampages the Arcadia High Science Fair, threatening to expose both the Troll world and Aja and Krel’s alien secret.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret “Echo” Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the “keys” in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret “Echo” Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) – and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Rhino didn't charge and he couldn't see very well at all. Poor old Rhino really wanted to be invited to the Dance of the Horns up on the plains with Buffalo and all the other horned animals. But Rhino didn't have a horn, so he wasn't allowed. The Monkeys decide to help Rhino and make him a horn from a piece of old wood. But when Rhino wakes up he doesn't know what it is. ‘Aargh! Thing on the end of my nose! CHAAaarge!' And that's Why Rhino Charges. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see Caterpillar was never in a hurry. When all the animals were racing around Tinga Tinga getting ready for the Best-dressed parade, Caterpillar was happy to sit in a tree and munch on leaves saying ‘Po-le, po-le, slowly, slowly, good things come to those who wait'. Then one day the rains come and Caterpillar disappears into a cocoon. ‘What's happening?' questions Elephant. ‘Wait and see' says Tortoise wisely ‘Wait and See'. Then Caterpillar transforms into the most beautiful butterfly ever!... But who wins the Best-dressed parade? Tales from Africa

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Julian is very excited about the Sealife Awareness Day at Greendale School. While he's talking to Pat about it, his dad gets a call from Ben - a special delivery! Pat discovers it's a giant inflatable shark which is to be the surprise centrepiece of the Sealife day. But when Pat stops to help Alf mend a gate, a mix-up with parcel tape ends up with the whale accidentally inflating and floating off... Pat must use his ingenuity to catch the whale and - most important of all - deliver it in time for the special Sealife Awareness event...

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat must deliver Ben to Greendale School, dressed as superhero, The Blue Flash. But Ben keeps stopping to help people on the way and his costume gets increasingly ruined! Meanwhile at the school, Julian can't wait to meet his hero but Sarah Gilbertson insists that The Blue Flash isn't real... At last Pat arrives at the school with Ben wearing a new costume hastily cobbled together by Pat. Julian isn't fooled. Looks like The Blue Flash isn't real after all... But then Pat tells the kids how Ben helped people on the way and they realise he is a REAL superhero!

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing
programme.desc: After winning a citizen swap contest, Archibald moves to a mountain town for a week. Archibald finds a practical use for his pal's wacky invention.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing
programme.desc: Crackridge's new resident dinosaur has a hard time fitting in. Archibald and a new friend attempt to conquer their fear of the basement.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is upset because her best friend, Deltoid, keeps calling her a monster and running away from her. Noddy decides to investigate and find out why Deltoid's behaving so strangely. He soon discovers that Deltoid has lost all his memories and doesn't recognise any of his friends anymore. It takes all Noddy's powers of deduction and gathering evidence on the WhoWhatWhere Tablet to realise that Deltoid has lost his memory chip! All he has to do now is stop Deltoid trying to trap Smartysaurus long enough to refit the chip and restore his memories. Good luck Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Pat-Pat is meant to be giving a baton twirling display at the Town Hall but the stage is covered with sticky stuff. Clockwork Mouse and Carlton can clear up the sticky stuff but Noddy must investigate to find out who was trying to spoil Pat-Pat's show or they might do it again! Using his wwwbook to follow all the clues from polishing day at the Fairy Castle to Fairy Coco swapping the polish for a ribbon, Noddy works out it was Pat-Pat who tried to delay her show. She wanted to practise more! Noddy and Bumpy help Pat-Pat to feel confident about the performance and she gives a great display. Thanks, Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Fuse is heartbroken when his new special toy wash is broken. Right before Revs could have a wash in it too! Noddy decides to investigate and help the little robot find out who has broken it. Using all his investigating skills and collecting evidence with the WhoWhatWhere Tablet Noddy realises that it's his own best beloved car, Revs, who broke the toy wash! Poor Revs thought that if he went through the toy wash he'd miss his special time with Noddy and Bumpy. Noddy finds a way for Revs to enjoy the toy wash AND still has his special playtime with his best friends. Clever Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Everyone in Fable Fields is very worried that a new Dazzle Dragon has appeared in the land. Big Ears says there's no such thing as a Dragon in Toyland so Noddy decides to investigate. All the evidence seems to lead to a dragon – footprints, loud noises and glimpses of shiny scales in the woods but clever Noddy thinks it through and, using his investigating skills of looking and looking again, soon realises that the ‘dragon' isn't a dragon at all! It's the knights out on patrol in their shiny armour and tight formation! Phew! Thanks Noddy!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders get stuck in a cave with their rival, Magnus, during a race to find a new source of an important mineral.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Frustrated that she's not fitting in with the team, Aggro goes off on her own with Elbone on a mission to save a dragon egg trapped in ice.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries

Now it's up to the Dew Drops to find Captain Meow Meow and get that splinter out.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: One of Tag’s biggest dreams is to be a contestant on her favorite TV game show: The Pawmazing Race, hosted by Kelly Korgi. Which is why she entered her entire family to compete in the family edition! And now that dream is finally coming true! / The Barker Family continue their quest to become the winners of The Pawmazing Race. But the challenges only get tougher from here on out. Tag learns that her family’s quirky traits can help them through any obstacle.

programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: Today is Yarn Ball Day, a special day in the cat-filled town of Meowbuquerque. Unfortunately, the bridge leading to the party is broken. With time ticking, Tag, Scooch, and Kit work together at getting the cats across to the party. / When The Barkapellas announce that they’re cancelling their biggest concert ever, Tag is determined to figure out why in order to get them back on stage. But with a stadium full of impatient fans, Tag is going to have to work fast.

programme.desc: When Dagur the Deranged captures Gustav, it's up to Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders to get him back.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino’s 8th film takes place in wintry Wyoming, where eight strangers, including two bounty hunters and a wanted fugitive, find themselves battling the elements and each other.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: In Doomsday, a deadly virus resurfaces decades after quarantine. As chaos erupts, a team enters the walled-off zone to find a cure. Action-packed and gritty, it's a battle for survival.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister’s place in the games.

programme.title: U-571
programme.desc: Inspired by real WWII events, this film follows an American submarine crew tasked with capturing a German U-boat carrying the Enigma code machine. A tense, underwater action thriller full of deception, danger, and survival.

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days
programme.desc: It is 1872, and a British inventor, a Chinese thief and a French artist set off to circumnavigate the globe in 80 days. They travel by land, air, sea, and in-line skates in order to beat the clock and finish where they started.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister’s place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire

programme.title: The Deal
programme.desc: A mother fights to save the life of her ailing daughter after an unprecedented pandemic ravaged the planet, leaving resources so scarce you must pay for them with your life.

programme.title: The Librarian: The Quest For The Spear
programme.desc: A bookworm becomes the librarian. Same night a magical spear gets stolen and he's off to get some real life experience around the globe on his quest for the spear - starting with being thrown off a plane over Amazonas by his cute helper.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: The First Night with the Duke
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary college girl finds herself reincarnated as a background extra in a romance novel, only to spend a night with the story's most dangerously obsessive male lead. A romantic fantasy with no brakes begins!

programme.desc: The training academy from Dogs are Incredible! For pet owners struggling with issues like biting, aggression, or excessive barking from their beloved dogs who've become part of the family. Experts from various fields provide customized training methods and tailored advice — helping unruly dogs transform into well-behaved companions!

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Hong Kong action cinema is famous for its real kung fu moves performed by a group called “Kung Fu Stuntmen”. This docu-film pays tribute to the generations of kung fu stuntmen, with the crew spending over two years digging archives and interviewing many talents, including the most prominent masters like Jackie Chan, Donnie Yen and Sammo Hung.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn…

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agent Wen is assigned to work undercover for a Southeast Asian military arm dealer to find some munitions and to destroy them. When he finally finds the munitions though, he is attacked by unknown gangsters and has to team up with his partner to recover the munitions so as to prevent a disaster from occurring.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael celebrates the Italian flag by bringing us three different pastas in all three of its colours. She breaks down the steps to make a delicious cacio e pepe with copious amounts of cheese.

programme.title: Legends Of The Fork
programme.desc: Buddy checks out two legendary restaurants that originated as people's actual homes. First, he's going to the Loveless Cafe to taste their southern staples like crispy fried chicken and tender pork chops.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece brings together Southern and Indian flavours with her black-eyed pea biryani. She sautés the peas with vegetables, spices and coconut milk, then bakes it with rice.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Dining without wi-fi facilities might be too much for some people, but anyone wanting to unleash their wild side should join host Michael Yo for a journey to some far-out eating places.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.

programme.title: A Boyfriend To Die For
programme.desc: Olivia never wanted to be known as a product of nepotism, but as a rising star in her father's firm, that's exactly how people see her. Determined to prove herself, she meets Jonathan Rothfield.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Semi-dried tomatoes are a new staple in American grocery stores. Rachael demonstrates how to use them as the star in her recipe for a pesto paired with broccolini and served with sausage.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: It’s Day Two, contestants are thrown into their first big Service Challenge. With Jamie Oliver running the kitchen, they need to impress the judges and feed 40 MasterChef Legends with a three-course meal.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today's theme is "Gallery vs. Natural" interiors. We'll be showcasing homes that highlight the contrast between the bold gallery style and the serene natural aesthetic.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris

programme.desc: Traumatized by the tragic death of his girlfriend, Jerome drops out of school and retreats to the province where he opens his own inn. Though still broken-hearted, Jerome settles into his new abode and leads a more serene life.

programme.title: Fantastica
programme.desc: The proprietor of a struggling carnival must help a prince from another land find three lost princesses.

programme.title: The Gifted
programme.desc: Childhood best friends who are both geniuses in school eventually become bittersweet rivals for campus athlete Mark Ferrer.

programme.title: Ang Pagsanib Kay Leah dela Cruz
programme.desc: A lady cop who moves into a small town gets drawn to a case that involves a girl that's possessed by an evil spirit.

programme.title: Anong Ganap?
programme.desc: Being in on the entertainment circle is quick and easy on PBO's Anong Ganap? Presented by the gorgeous entertainment anchor ng bayan, Phoemela Baranda.

programme.title: Steal
programme.desc: When money is involved, trust is a big word. Four Filipinas based in Japan will learn the hard truth about money and trust as they get entangled in their own schemes.

programme.title: Basagan ng Mukha
programme.desc: Basagan ng Mukha

programme.title: Ulan
programme.desc: Maya (Nadine Lustre) is a girl who has always held a pessimistic view of the rain, reminding her of failed love and other depressing things. Will the rain ever stop her in her journey to overcome past heartaches?

programme.title: Mana-Mana Tiba-Tiba
programme.desc: Wilson and Uging, by the virtue of being the first two people who visited the wake of the late Don Segundo became heirs to a two-hundred million fortune.

programme.title: Till I Met You
programme.desc: Señor Manuel is an elderly gentleman who falls in love with the charming Luisa, a confident trickster posing as a rich socialite. Gabriel cares deeply for the old man and is very protective of the haciendero.

programme.title: Video City: Be Kind, Please Rewind
programme.desc: An uninspired filmmaker (Ruru Madrid) accidentally time travels back to the 90s at a Video City store, where he meets the woman (Yassi Pressman) who will change his life.

programme.title: Moron 5 and the Crying Lady
programme.desc: Why is Becky fighting so hard to have them suffer? The Moron 5 will try their hardest to know and hopefully understand what's really going on although little did they know that by doing so, everything that they hold dear might be at risk.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrel Miklos is embarking on a mission to solve one of the most intriguing mysteries in history: the disappearance of the Nazi's looted WWII treasure, estimated to be worth billions.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4)
programme.desc: As the team conducts their most complex experiment ever at the Triangle, they are stunned as a number of bizarre events unfold before their eyes.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Crashed UFOs. Recovered alien entities. For decades, incredible claims have been made about an extraterrestrial presence on Earth—and the government has gone to great lengths to discredit them.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: Quawntay Adams gets caught up in a big marijuana bust and is sentenced to a long prison term. When he finds out he is going to be a father, he determines to break out of his maximum-security cell.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: From WWII bombs pulled from the sea to chemical weapons hidden beneath Washington D.C.—these explosive discoveries prove that history’s blasts from the past can still shake our world.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: Thousands of people swear they've encountered this legendary North American creature, but Bigfoot has never been officially identified. As evidence continues to mount, the mystery endures.

programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrel Miklos is embarking on a mission to solve one of the most intriguing mysteries in history: the disappearance of the Nazi's looted WWII treasure, estimated to be worth billions.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S2)
programme.desc: From the legendary blades of ancient kings to a divine arsenal said to annihilate monsters, history is filled with tales of iconic sacred weapons. In this episode, we delve into how they were crafted.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4)
programme.desc: After conducting an experiment that reveals more evidence of incredible phenomena in the skies above Skinwalker Ranch, the team learns that the mystery of the property may be located deep underground.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII
programme.desc: Racing an incoming hurricane, Darrell Miklos and his team are forced to make tough choices. But after a season-long search, they locate the source of the massive magnetometer hit recorded at Target 4.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Mike braves icy waters to catch snow crabs living on the seafloor hundreds of feet below; Bret and Ivy travel uncharted terrain to create a new trail and build a log bridge to cross a deep creek.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: When the team hits more wood deep in the Money Pit area where GPR results detected what could be a chamber, the Fellowship is more convinced than ever that their search for answers is about to pay off.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team zeroes in on the island of Bermuda—namesake of the Triangle—and one of the most infamous mysteries that helped establish the dark reputation of these waters.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S12)
programme.desc: Tom begins the countdown to his 80th birthday. Jake and Anika tow a broken snowmobile down the mountain but run into fresh lion tracks and are back on the hunt. Paul sets out to take on a wolf pack.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII

programme.title: The Twelve Gold Medallions
programme.desc: This was one of top three films of 1970 and winner of "Outstanding Drama" at the 9th Golden Horse Awards. The evil minister uses twelve golden medallions to summon war hero Yueh Fei back from the frontline and execute him. A group of wandering warriors, led by Yueh Hua and Chin Ping, try to stop the medallion couriers.

programme.title: Death Duel
programme.desc: Third Master is a renowned swordsman in the martial arts world, but the constant challenges by other swordsmen compel him to fake his death and pursue a secluded life. This does not prevent others from seeking him out to challenge him however, and he is forced to return to fight his way till the end.

programme.title: The Goldfinger
programme.desc: Inspired by Hong Kong’s biggest financial scandal in the 1980s, this is a rags to riches story about Ching Yat Yin who is chairman of a listed company. With Ching’s wealth and influence on the rise, ICAC senior investigator Lau Kai Yuen is determined to investigate the case, even if it means spending 15 years in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Shaolin Temple
programme.desc: As more people are learning martial arts from Shaolin, the Qing court orders for it to be banned and plans to destroy the temple. The Shaolin disciples decide to take their protest to the streets, using Shaolin skills to curb their hatred, but when the Qing troops start attacking Shaolin Temple, the disciples vow to protect it at all costs.

programme.title: Black Ransom
programme.desc: Mann, an accomplished police officer, has allowed his career to wane after his wife was murdered by the mafia. However, Mann is forced to return to his former glory when he is assigned to investigate a former police inspector suspected to be kidnapping mafia bosses and demanding ransoms in exchange for their lives.

programme.title: The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Wang's odd behaviour and quirky ideas make him a social outcast. His teenage nephew Zhou, who is ashamed of his stutter, becomes Wang's only friend. Together, these misfits challenge traditional family expectations and social misunderstandings, supporting and inspiring each other as they seek their own paths in life.

programme.title: The Unwavering Brotherhood
programme.desc: The revered elder of a triad gang faces succession uncertainty when his three trusted underlings—Hua, Fei, and Guo—are robbed while transporting gang money. Determined to redeem himself, Hua vows to track down the robbers. However, when Hua discovers that Fei and Guo are connected to the robbery, he must choose between loyalty and brotherhood.

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays an arrogant god in Heaven who is being punished for his pranks and mistakes. He is sent to Earth and reincarnate as Mad Monk to change the destiny of three misguided souls - a prostitute, a beggar and a villain. The Mad Monk needs to complete the task in three days in order to return to Heaven.

programme.title: A Taste Of Cold Steel
programme.desc: Gan Dai Xiong is killed by Prince Wu, who seeks to seize his Purple Sword. Prince Wu’s son join forces with an evil gang to steal the Purple Sword from Gan Dai Xiong’s three daughters. Eventually, Gan’s daughters team up with their cousin Xu to avenge their father’s death.

programme.title: Have Sword Will Travel
programme.desc: When the head of a manor loses his kung fu skills, he enlists his nephew and fiancée to escort gold to the capital. Along the way, they encounter a mysterious swordsman and join forces with him to stop bandits from stealing the gold.

programme.title: Flying Guillotine 2
programme.desc: In a time of anti-Manchu sentiment, Emperor Yong Zheng employs his ruthless Blood Hound Corps to silence any dissenters. Only one man and his signature weapon, The Flying Guillotine, stand in their way.

programme.title: The Thundering Sword
programme.desc: Two disciples, Yu and Zheng, are sent by their master to track down the invincible weapon “Thundering Sword” to prevent villains from getting it. Yu encounters the daughter of a ruthless clan, Chiao, who is on her way to seek for the sword. They quickly fall for each other, but when Chiao accidentally injures Zheng, things become complicated.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn…

programme.title: Atonement
programme.desc: Single father Lung and his daughter Ying mean the world to each other. A firm believer in karma, Lung has his faith shattered when Ying is abducted during a trip to Thailand. Years later, as he tries to start anew with a second marriage, his relentless search for her kidnappers descends into a dark and dangerous pursuit of vengeance.

programme.title: Bloody Parrot
programme.desc: A swordsman is suspected of being the thief of a treasure sent to Emperor. Through his investigation, he is led on to the trail of the supernatural “Bloody Parrot”. Poisonous things happen including a demonic possession, witches casting poison spells and disgusting autopsies. Then a dead constable turns into a vampire!

programme.title: Hawak Ko Buhay Mo
programme.desc: Ronnie Ricketts played the leader of an anti-vice squad. Two problems occupied his mind at the moment. A mysterious killer who broke the necks of his victims and a group of skinheads, who kidnapped pretty coeds to be sold to white slavery.

programme.title: Room For Rent
programme.desc: The marriage of Jessie and Peter was suffering from a cold spell. When Jessie allowed her aerobic instructress, Sandra and her boyfriend, Johnny to rent the couple's spare room, Jessie had no idea how spiced up all their love lives would be.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Iyong Kandungan
programme.desc: Ramona (Vivian Velez) is ecstatic when she marries Rommel (Ronaldo Valdez). But Ramona remains a virgin wife as Rommel turns out to be a closet homosexual with a boyfriend, Alex (Mark Gil).

programme.title: Muling Buksan Ang Puso (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Too much love suffocates and covetousness can breed hate.

programme.title: Sa Isang Sulok Ng Pangarap
programme.desc: Alice Dixson turned in two powerful performances as the young woman forced into plastic surgery and as the wife she was made to resemble who got hold of her husband's (Ariel Rivera) money and then ran off with her lover.

programme.title: Di Na Natuto (Sorry Na, Puede Ba?) (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Ysmael (Robin Padilla) is the rich family's black sheep, unlike his older brother Bongbong. They both want to win the heart of their female worker, Carlota (Sharon Cuneta).

programme.title: Kanto Boy 2 (Anak Ni Totoy Gwapo)
programme.desc: Guiller, the son of the notorious Totoy Guwapo grew up as an orphan. He ended up in prison after accidentally killing a man in a street fight and it was there that he came to terms with life and discovered his own identity.

programme.title: Pitong Gamol
programme.desc: They are uneducated but smart. They are orphans but the whole neighborhood is their family. Life treats them harshly but they survive.

programme.title: Kumander Bawang
programme.desc: Herbert Bautista comes from a family of vampire killers. The male heirs reek with the stench of garlic and are endowed with super powers. There is a need for Kumander Bawang and is off to fight the vampire.

programme.title: Batangueño Kabitenyo
programme.desc: This is a story of Magno,who is from Batangas and has the ability to attract women like flies.He goes to Manila hoping to change.

programme.title: Bratpack, Pambayad Atraso
programme.desc: Gang rivalry among well-to-do teenagers erupted into a tension-filled situation when a group of terrorists took over the school campus. Forced to fight together to save the lives of their fellow students and teachers, the brats engaged the invaders in an exciting battle to free the hostages.

programme.title: Kung Mahawi Man Ang Ulap (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: The happy life of Hilda and her widowed mother, Gloria, changed for the worse when Eddie and his family moved in as their tenants. In no time at all, Gloria had gotten married to Eddie and was providing for his entire family. Still, she lived for the day when she would be able to reclaim what's rightfully hers.

programme.title: Kontra Bandido
programme.desc: Apo Lakay has once rescued Bochok and his sister from the evil clutches of Ka Turing. This time, it is Bochok's turn to rescue the oldman from the same villain. Will he be able to do it?

Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Before killing herself, she curses them to be haunted in their dreams. As the friends are killed off one by one, they must break the curse to escape their deadly fate.

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: They Wait in the Dark
programme.desc: Amy and her adopted son Adrian flee from her abusive ex-girlfriend Judith. Seeking refuge in an abandoned farmhouse in Amy's Kansas hometown, they confront a supernatural evil force from her dark past that haunts Adrian. As Judith pursues them, Amy and Adrian must face the dangers both outside and within the house.

programme.title: Never Leave
programme.desc: Strange incidents keep happening in Lin Yue's house after a car accident: her sister cannot see the images of her family members in the mirror; her father is peeping at night; and there is the sound of marbles from the attic every day at dawn. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Lonely Ah Zhen is bullied by his coworkers. When he spends his birthday with Yumi, his friends shockingly discover that Yumi is an inflatable doll. Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: The Windmill Massacre
programme.desc: Jennifer joins a tour to explore the renowned windmills of the Netherlands. As their tour coach breaks down on the way, they seek refuge in a creepy shed near a sinister windmill with a dark history. When some tour members suddenly disappear, Jennifer discovers a shared secret among them, linking their fates in a chilling revelation.

programme.title: City Confidential (S8)
programme.desc: Murders are rare in tranquil Delta Township. So when a well-liked couple is gunned down in their home, residents are terrified — until police discover the monster accidentally left a trail of breadcrumbs.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were both outsiders from troubled homes. They felt they understood each other when no one else did. Together they made a plan to get rid of the mum and sister Kim resented.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When jewellery seller Minerva Cantu, 26, is found bound, gagged and lifeless in her home, police suspect robbery as the motive.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: After rideshare driver Carolina Vargas drove a nice stranger to his hotel, she didn't have qualms about giving him another ride. But her trusting gesture turned tragic.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3)
programme.desc: A Kentucky community is rocked to its core when a prominent family is gunned down in their home after Sunday church service. The sole survivor of the attack claims he killed an intruder in self-defence.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3)
programme.desc: After a woman's body is found in a neighbourhood dumpster, investigators narrow down their suspect list to three people, but will they be able to convince the men to break their brotherly bond?

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S1)
programme.desc: A suspect flees from a high-speed car chase while carrying her infant child. State troopers catch a man with a stolen utility pole strapped to the roof of his car.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S1)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. A man streaks across a golf course, delaying a tournament. A dead fish is eerily placed on the front porch of a house; and more.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1)
programme.desc: First-timers and frequent flyers get booked, including the son of a deputy who is charged with stealing a dog, and an intoxicated gentleman comes back to see his favourite policeman.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Social media influencer Alexis Murphy was on her way to a hair appointment, but never arrived. When a photo of her abandoned car was posted online, her worried loved-ones knew something was terribly wrong.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old struggling to make it on her own goes missing, her family kicks into high gear to find her.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An angry defendant flips off the judge during a virtual hearing; a victim is cross-examined by her accused attacker; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An accused stalker screams expletives at the judge; a shooting victim's mother cries for justice; an assistant prosecutor argues with the judge; and more.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: In Mobile, a professor is murdered in his own home. It takes a missing gaming console and a strategic game of cat and mouse with the suspects for detectives and prosecutors to get justice.
